dialogues.text:
──3 months later.
The clinic continued to operate smoothly.
However, most of the revenue was being spent at the shop...
Welcome again today, customer♡
(I came here again... what should I buy today...)
Your cumulative purchase amount has finally exceeded 5 million yen♡
F-five million!? I spent that much...
Hehe♡ That's wonderful♡
Actually... I have a request for you, customer♡
A-a request?
Could I test prototype products we're developing on you, customer?♡
Of course, I'll do things even more extreme than VIP service...♡
──After that, {{playerName}} became the clerk's test subject.
Today is a new aphrodisiac oil♡
It's supposed to turn your entire body into an erogenous zone the moment it's applied...♡
First I'll apply it to my own body, then I'll apply it to you, customer♡
The clerk began undressing and applying oil all over her body.
Mmm...♡ Amazing... my whole body really is becoming sensitive...♡
Plenty on my breasts too...♡
Mmm...♡ My nipples are... getting so hard♡
On my pussy too... ahhh♡ My clitoris...♡
(W-what a sight...)
Now then, customer...♡
I'll apply the oil with my breasts♡
The clerk pressed her breasts against {{playerName}}'s body, spreading the oil.
See... can you feel my nipples getting hard?♡
Uwaaah! Amazing! My whole body...!
For your lower body... I'll apply it with my pussy♡
The clerk straddled {{playerName}} and rubbed her wet private parts while applying the oil.
Ahh♡ My love juices and the oil on your cock, customer...♡
Uhhh!
Hehe♡ Your reactions are perfect♡
I've gathered the data, so we should be able to commercialize this♡
──Another day
Today is an electric new device...♡
Please let me attach it to your cock and collect data♡
(I'm ready for anything now...!)
{{playerName}} had completely become the clerk's test subject.
However, he felt a strange satisfaction in being able to experience extreme new products before anyone else.
Thanks to you, customer, we're developing wonderful products one after another♡
Please continue to be my monitor for a long time to come...♡
Next time I'll prepare something even more amazing♡
Yes! I'm looking forward to it!

He was supposed to succeed as a therapist,
but somehow ended up becoming a test subject for adult goods.
But maybe this is happiness in its own way.
【SHOP END - Clerk's Monitor END】
